channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: ARC Raiders Hits 16 Million Sales and Secures ‘Exceptionally High’ Engagement
item.content:encoded:
Nexon has published a massive financial report that digs into Q1 2026 results, which naturally includes the performance of Embark Studios and, by association, ARC Raiders. It turns out that ARC Raiders is still exceeding expectations, despite a recent downturn in sentiment.

ARC Raiders, the revolutionary extraction adventure game released in October, has hit a whopping 16 million sales, making it the best-selling game in Nexon’s history. It shipped a massive 4.6 million units in Q1 2026 alone, and is maintaining stunning engagement figures, the gaming titan confirmed.

ARC Raiders Isn’t Going Anywhere

Despite recent complaints about Embark Studios’ pivot away from monthly updates, the ARC Raiders ecosystem is going nowhere anytime soon. The game continues to sell like hot cakes, and Nexon has sung the title’s praises in a recent financial update.

It was confirmed that ARC Raiders has sold through 16 million copies, and more than half of active players have logged more than 100 hours of playtime, which the company dubbed ‘exceptionally high engagement.’

The team also confirmed that an ISBN license has been obtained in China and that multiple closed beta tests are coming this year, which will introduce the title to a massive new market, bolstering sales further.

Later this year, ARC Raiders will undergo a monumental update, named Frozen Trail, which will introduce the largest map yet, multiple new ARC enemies, a massive ARC operation, and new ways to progress. This was announced yesterday, along with confirmation that Embark Studios is slowing down on iteration to keep things fresher, but with longer gaps between major updates.

Are you eager to see where ARC Raiders goes from here? Let us know your thoughts on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that Amazon isn’t done with The Lord of the Rings

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

item.title: Amazon Isn’t Done With Lords of the Rings Games, Despite MMO Cancelation
item.content:encoded:
Late last year, it was suspected that Amazon had done away with the developing Lord of the Rings MMO. The belief that the game had been axed came after news surfaced on social media regarding layoffs at Amazon Games, which impacted the ‘fledgling Lord of the Rings game’.

It was never explicitly confirmed that it had been canceled, but a new comment from Amazon’s Head of Games, Jeff Grattis, seems to align with that notion. It’s not all bad, as the team is still working on a Lord of the Rings game, even if it’s not an MMO.

What’s Happening With Lord of the Rings Games?

In a new report from Eurogamer, Jeff Grattis explained what the state of play is with Lord of the Rings at Amazon Games. The head honcho in the gaming space at the tech titan played it safe and didn’t use definitive terms, but suggested that something LOTR-related is still in the works:

Our creative team continues to explore a compelling new game experience that does justice to Tolkien’s world; we are working closely with Middle-earth and remain excited about the IP.

This was in response to a question directly asking if the LOTR MMO had been shelved.

It was back in 2023 that the Lord of the Rings MMO was first announced, but Amazon Games fell into radio silence. Even when layoffs became apparent across social media, the team declined to make any clear statements about the future of the title, which, according to dismissed former employees, would have been something special.

Months ago, a paradigm shift took place at Amazon Games, with hundreds of developers moving away from New World, which is going offline next year. They were shifted onto Lord of the Rings, which was subsequently canceled (but not confirmed), hence further layoffs landed at the firm.

According to Eurogamer’s source, the only developers left standing at Amazon Games in the MMO space are working on Lost Ark, Throne and Liberty, and New World, but all of them could be staring down temporary gigs.

Would you have liked to see the Lord of the Rings MMO materialize? Let us know your thoughts on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that ARC Raiders is getting a new trader

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

item.title: ARC Raiders’ First New Trader Since Launch is Coming Next Week
item.content:encoded:
Embark Studios has announced some drastic changes coming to the ARC Raiders operating model, specifically around how regularly updates will be deployed across the ecosystem. Unfortunately, the cadence is being slowed massively, reducing major updates to just twice a year, much to the chagrin of the game’s most avid players.

On a more positive note, the team also revealed that the game’s first new trader is entering the game next week, bringing with him some fresh mechanics to help the endgame lull. This is something that needed to be addressed, so it’s good to see Embark doing something about the rut that late-game players find themselves in.

New ARC Raiders Trader Changes The Endgame

The new ARC Raiders trader, who is unnamed at the moment but suspected to be Bilguun, enters the game from a nomadic tribe of surface-dwelling folk, which is interesting in itself. That suggests that there are more people on the surface than we first thought, and that Speranza isn’t the last bastion of humanity.

Next week, this mysterious new trader arrives in ARC Raiders, and he’s coming specifically to help out late-game players who have progressed to a point of potentially having a packed stash and nothing to do about it.

The unnamed trader will offer unique rewards, rare items, and cosmetics in exchange for high-value items. Additionally, he’ll offer sporadic quests that require players to venture into the wasteland, bringing back specific items to exchange for exclusive rewards.

To unlock the new ARC Raiders trader, you’ll need to be at least level 25, and this is where the whole ‘endgame’ concept comes into play.

This trader will allow players to unlock two key benefits:

  • Extra stash space to give you more room to store your loot
  • An Expedition Vault that permits the ‘carrying over’ of five items when you wipe your account every two months or so

Embark Studios stated that this trader is part of a bid to improve the progression model in ARC Raiders. Later, players will unlock a new skill path system and more ways to flesh out their Raider in this ambitious extraction adventure game.

Of course, the bulk of these changes won’t arrive until the next major update lands in October, which is a sensitive point for die-hard fans.

Are you looking forward to leaning on the new ARC Raiders trader? Let us know what you’re thinking on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that GTA 6’s pre-order date might have leaked

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

item.title: Fortnite Zero Build Patch Notes: All Zero Build Changes, Explained
item.content:encoded:
Fortnite has gone through several periods of evolution over the news, but a major patch on May 14 is bringing wholesale changes to Zero Build.

The Epic Games mode has become a popular approach in Fortnite for players who don’t want to deal with the complexities of the build mechanics, and the May 14 update is an experimental one, making significant changes to Zero Build.

If you want to see details of all the Zero Build changes in Fortnite, Insider Gaming has you covered.

All Fortnite Zero Build Changes

Fortnite has seen some major adjustments made to Zero Build for the final weeks of Season 2, with the experiment set to impact the future of the game.

Landing alongside the huge Overwatch collab, new items have been added to the loot pool, providing more defensive and utility items in rotation. Additionally, there are new Zero Build exclusive items, Improved Smokle Grenades and Brick-a-Bunkers.

There are also no more fall damage eliminations, as lethal fall damage has been removed. Now, a would-be fatal fall triggers a ‘Splat’ animation, dropping your health to 1 HP and removing all shields and overshield.

  • More Insider Gaming: When Will Fortnite Servers Be Back Up?

All of the Fortnite Zero Build patch notes are below, courtesy of Epic Games:

  • New ‘Pocket Items’ have replaced the old Build button. Pocket Items are unlimited-use utility items with cooldowns; you start every match with one equipped and can swap at Vending Machines around the map. Shockwave Grenades, Med Mist Grenades, and Shield Bubbles are the three Pocket Items available at launch.
  • All players now start matches with a Pistol, a Small Shield Potion, and their Pocket Item.
  • You can now rush to the ground from the Battle Bus. Instead of auto-deploying your Glider near the ground, you can manually cut it and free-fall the last stretch. Be careful!
  • Glider Redeploy returns from elevated positions for cleaner rotations across the map.
  • Holding your Pickaxe grants unlimited Stamina so you can cover ground without burning out.
  • Eliminations now restore your Overshield, rewarding aggressive play.
  • Environmental structures now take significantly less damage from weapons. A boulder, a tree, a random shed will all now hold up as much better cover.
  • Reboot Van timers have been reduced so you can get the squad back in faster.

Are The Zero Build Changes Permanent?

No, the changes made on May 15 in Fortnite’s Zero Build are not permanent, instead serving as an ‘experiment’ for the future of the mode.

Zero Build is themed around “pure gunplay”, and Epic Games wants to “push that identity further,” with the experiment bringing in significant changes for the remainder of Season 2.

  • More Insider Gaming: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 3 Start Date

Player feedback will shape how Zero Build will be adjusted next season and beyond, and for other Battle Royale modes, showing that Epic Games is ready for a full identity change of the mode.

More details will be shared in future and it remains to be seen how these wholesale changes impact the mode.

What do you think of the Zero Build overhaul in Fortnite? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Fortnite, take a look at all the Rebirth requirements in Droid Tycoon, and check out the full roadmap for Star Wars content in May.

MOBILE APP

item.title: GTA 6 Pre-Order Date Has Allegedly Leaked Via Best Buy
item.content:encoded:
GTA 6 pre-orders are supposedly set to go live next week, starting May 18, 2026, as a Best Buy email has leaked when you can place your pre-order. Plenty of people have been sent the email online, but Insider Gaming has since received the email, and we can independently verify that it’s real.

Sent out to affiliates, the email reveals the campaign is for none other than the highly anticipated Grand Theft Auto 6, with the pre-orders set to begin on May 18, five months before the game’s November 19 release date. If pre-orders were to go live, it could very well rule out fears of another delay.

Check out this post by GTA6Alerts on X, who has shared a video of the email, as well as live screenshots of others corroborating the news.

GTA 6 Trailer 3 Could Be Around The Corner

The pre-order news has once again got fans online speculating that the highly rumored Trailer 3 could be right around the corner, with many suspecting that the trailer will close with the official pre-order announcement.

The anticipation surrounding GTA 6 has only continued to grow in recent months. It has now been over a year since Rockstar last showed substantial footage of the game, while Trailer 2 has already surpassed 160 million views on YouTube alone.

With excitement at an all-time high and fans desperate for fresh details, the rumored May 18 pre-order date has many believing Rockstar could finally be preparing to pull back the curtain once again.

Will you be pre-ordering GTA 6, whenever it does go live? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, read about the major changes made to ARC Raiders’ update schedule, as well as Crimson Desert DLC being considered by Pearl Abyss.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For May 14, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, May 14, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Good
  • Hint 2: Okay
  • Hint 3: Alright

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Additional
  • Even
  • One
  • Pay
  • Penalty
  • Fee
  • Charge
  • Citation
  • Ticket

Today’s Contexto Answer For May 14, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Fine

Fine often means good or good enough, though it can also refer to a financial punishment.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on May 15.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…
